overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character riding a horse along a riverside wilderness trail at night. The scene is illuminated by a lantern attached to the horse, revealing grassy and rocky terrain, scattered boulders, and distant forested hills under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverside trail with scattered rocks

events.description: horse slows from trot to a brief walk or stop before continuing

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a grassy riverside path at night, illuminated by a lantern, with brief slowdown

entered.detail: flowing water visible to the left of the path
green grass covering the ground along the river
large rock formations and boulders scattered along the riverbank
dark tree-covered hills rising in the distance
dark starry sky with visible clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse and rider along a grassy riverside trail at night. A lantern illuminates the immediate path ahead while the starry sky and forested hills are visible in the background. The horse briefly slows its pace around the 10-second mark before continuing along the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside path transitioning to dirt trail

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to rocky dirt and gravel

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain becomes rockier and more uneven, with distant lights becoming visible

entered.detail: large rock formation jutting out near the river
faint illuminated points visible on the horizon
prominent boulder passing by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from grassy banks to a rockier, gravelly path as the rider continues along the river. The river moves further to the left while large rock formations become prominent features. Distant lights appear on the horizon, suggesting a settlement or structure ahead, and the vegetation becomes sparser.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail approaching large dead tree and distant structure

events.description: large dead tree becomes prominent central landmark ahead

agents.ego_description: riding toward a large distinctive dead tree with a distant illuminated building becoming visible ahead

entered.detail: tall leafless tree with gnarled branches becoming the focal point ahead
structure with illuminated windows visible in the distance
building with warm light glowing from within, possibly a house or camp

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the rider approaching a prominent large dead tree that dominates the center of the frame before passing it on the left. The terrain remains rocky and uneven, with a distant illuminated structure becoming visible ahead, suggesting the destination or a point of interest. The river continues to flow on the left while the path winds through increasingly sparse vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverside trail at night, transitioning from lush grassy banks to a stark, rocky wilderness. It begins by following a horse and rider through soft grass under a starry sky, with a lantern casting a warm glow on the winding path and distant forested hills. As the rider continues, the terrain shifts from greenery to a gravelly path where the river recedes to the left and large rock formations begin to dominate the landscape. The scene then opens up as vegetation becomes sparser and distant lights appear on the horizon, leading the camera toward a prominent dead tree that looms in the center of the frame. Finally, the rider passes the tree on the left, moving across the uneven ground toward an illuminated structure visible in the distance.
